terms.title: Terms of Service and Personal Data Processing Policy

s1.heading: 1. Data Controller Identification
s1.p1: TravelHub S.A.S., a company incorporated under the laws of the Republic of Colombia, identified with NIT 901.234.567-8, located in Bogotá D.C., acts as the Data Controller for personal data collected through the TravelHub platform (hereinafter, "the Platform").

s2.heading: 2. Legal Framework
s2.p1: Personal data processing is governed by Law 1581 of 2012 (Personal Data Protection Law), Decree 1377 of 2013, and other applicable Colombian legal provisions. TravelHub commits to complying with the principles of legality, purpose, freedom, accuracy, transparency, restricted access and circulation, security, and confidentiality.

s3.heading: 3. Personal Data Collected
s3.intro: Upon creating an account on the Platform, TravelHub collects the following data:
s3.item4: Booking and search history on the Platform
s3.item5: IP address and browsing data for security and service improvement purposes
s3.outro: No sensitive data as defined by Article 5 of Law 1581 of 2012 is collected.

s4.heading: 4. Processing Purposes
s4.intro: Personal data will be processed for the following purposes:
s4.item1: Manage user registration and authentication on the Platform.
s4.item3: Send transactional notifications related to bookings (confirmations, reminders, cancellations).
s4.item4: Improve user experience through aggregated and anonymous analysis of Platform usage.
s4.item5: Comply with legal obligations and requirements from competent authorities.
s4.outro: TravelHub will not sell, transfer or share users' personal data with third parties for commercial purposes without the data subject's express and prior consent.

s5.heading: 5. Authorization for Data Processing (Habeas Data)
s5.p1: By creating an account and checking the consent box in the registration form, the user grants their free, prior, express, and informed consent to TravelHub S.A.S. for the processing of their personal data as established in this Policy and in Law 1581 of 2012.
s5.p2: This authorization may be revoked at any time by written request addressed to datos@travelhub.co, without affecting the lawfulness of processing based on consent prior to its withdrawal.

s6.heading: 6. Data Subject Rights (ARCO Rights)
s6.intro: In accordance with Law 1581 of 2012, the data subject has the following rights:
s6.i1text: Know, update and correct your personal data.
s6.i2text: Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data.
s6.i3text: Request deletion of your data when no longer needed for the declared purposes, provided there is no legal obligation to retain them.
s6.i4text: Object to the processing of your data for specific purposes, including commercial communications.
s6.i5text: Receive your data in a structured and commonly used format.
s6.outro: To exercise any of these rights, the data subject must send a request to datos@travelhub.co indicating their full name, registered email, and the specific request. TravelHub will respond within the statutory timeframes (10 business days for inquiries; 15 business days for claims).

s7.heading: 7. Data Security
s7.p1: TravelHub implements appropriate technical, administrative, and physical measures to protect personal data against unauthorized access, loss, alteration, or disclosure. Passwords are stored in encrypted form using secure hashing algorithms. Communications are conducted through encrypted protocols (HTTPS/TLS).

s8.heading: 8. Data Retention
s8.p1: Personal data will be retained for as long as the user maintains an active account on the Platform and, subsequently, for the minimum period required by applicable law or necessary to address claims arising from the contractual relationship.

s9.heading: 9. Changes to This Policy
s9.p1: TravelHub reserves the right to modify this Policy at any time. Substantial changes will be notified to the user's registered email at least 30 days in advance. Continued use of the Platform following notification constitutes acceptance of the new version.

s10.heading: 10. Contact and Claims
s10.intro: For any inquiry, request, or claim related to personal data processing, you may contact us at:
s10.item2: Address: Cra. 7 # 71-21, Office 402, Bogotá D.C., Colombia
s10.outro: You may also file complaints with the Superintendencia de Industria y Comercio (SIC) as the data protection supervisory authority in Colombia (www.sic.gov.co).
